questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某大学研究实验室需要将 30 TB 数据从本地 Windows 文件服务器迁移到 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server。该实验室拥有 1 Gbps 的网络链路，与大学的许多其他部门共享。该实验室希望实施一项数据迁移服务，以最大限度地提高数据传输的性能。然而，实验室需要能够控制服务使用的带宽量，以尽量减少对其他部门的影响。数据迁移必须在接下来的 5 天内进行。哪种 AWS 解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A university research laboratory needs to migrate 30 TB of data from an on-premises Windows file server to Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. The laboratory has a 1 Gbps network link that many other departments in the university share. The laboratory wants to implement a data migration service that will maximize the performance of the data transfer. However, the laboratory needs to be able to control the amount of bandwidth that the service uses to minimize the impact on other departments. The data migration must take place within the next 5 days. Which AWS solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 雪锥
A.en: AWS Snowcone

B.zh: Amazon FSx 文件网关
B.en: Amazon FSx File Gateway

C.zh: AWS DataSync
C.en: AWS DataSync

D.zh: AWS 传输系列
D.en: AWS Transfer Family

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Snowcone 是用于离线数据迁移的物理设备。虽然适合小规模数据迁移，但需要设备运输时间，无法满足5天内完成迁移的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Snowcone is a physical appliance used for offline data migration. Although it is suitable for small-scale data migration, it requires time to transport the equipment and cannot meet the requirement of completing the migration within 5 days.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： FSx 文件网关主要用于将本地文件系统与 Amazon FSx 集成，适合对文件进行持续访问，但不专门用于大规模数据迁移。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: FSx File Gateway is mainly used to integrate local file systems with Amazon FSx and is suitable for continuous access to files, but is not specifically used for large-scale data migration.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS DataSync 是一项专门为快速安全地迁移数据而设计的服务。支持带宽限制功能，控制网络使用，适合共享网络环境下的数据迁移。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to migrate data quickly and securely. It supports bandwidth limitation function to control network usage and is suitable for data migration in a shared network environment.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Transfer Family 主要用于通过 SFTP、FTPS 或 FTP 协议传输数据。适合文件级传输，但不适合大规模数据迁移。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Transfer Family is mainly used to transfer data via SFTP, FTPS or FTP protocols. It is suitable for file-level transfer, but is not suitable for large-scale data migration.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (97%) 3%。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS DataSync 是一项专门为快速安全地迁移数据而设计的服务。支持带宽限制功能，控制网络使用，适合共享网络环境下的数据迁移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (97%) 3%. Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to migrate data quickly and securely. It supports bandwidth limitation function to control network usage and is suitable for data migration in a shared network environment.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要创建一款移动应用程序，允许用户在其移动设备上流式传输慢动作视频剪辑。目前，该应用程序捕获视频剪辑并将原始格式的视频剪辑上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶中。该应用程序直接从 S3 存储桶检索这些视频剪辑。然而，这些视频的原始格式很大。用户在移动设备上遇到缓冲和播放问题。该公司希望实施解决方案，以最大限度地提高应用程序的性能和可扩展性，同时最大限度地减少运营开销。哪种解决方案组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company wants to create a mobile app that allows users to stream slow-motion video clips on their mobile devices. Currently, the app captures video clips and uploads the video clips in raw format into an Amazon S3 bucket. The app retrieves these video clips directly from the S3 bucket. However, the videos are large in their raw format. Users are experiencing issues with buffering and playback on mobile devices. The company wants to implement solutions to maximize the performance and scalability of the app while minimizing operational overhead. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 部署 Amazon CloudFront 以进行内容交付和缓存。
A.en: Deploy Amazon CloudFront for content delivery and caching.

B.zh: 使用 AWS DataSync 跨 AWS 区域将视频文件复制到其他 S3 存储桶中。
B.en: Use AWS DataSync to replicate the video files across AWS Regions in other S3 buckets.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Elastic Transcoder 将视频文件转换为更合适的格式。
C.en: Use Amazon Elastic Transcoder to convert the video files to more appropriate formats.

D.zh: 在本地区域中部署 Amazon EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 组以进行内容交付和缓存。
D.en: Deploy an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances in Local Zones for content delivery and caching.

E.zh: 部署 Amazon EC2 实例的 Auto Scaling 组以将视频文件转换为更合适的格式。
E.en: Deploy an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances to convert the video files to more appropriate formats.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球分布式内容分发网络 (CDN)，可显著提高视频流性能并减少延迟。它支持缓存内容并优化内容交付，适合解决用户缓冲和播放问题。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon CloudFront is a globally distributed content delivery network (CDN) that dramatically improves video streaming performance and reduces latency. It supports caching content and optimizes content delivery, suitable for solving user buffering and playback issues.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS DataSync 主要用于数据迁移和同步，而不是用于优化视频流性能或格式转换。该选项与问题所需的性能优化和视频播放问题无关。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DataSync is primarily used for data migration and synchronization, not for optimizing video streaming performance or format conversion. This option has nothing to do with the performance optimization and video playback issues required by the question.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon Elastic Transcoder 是一项专门用于视频格式转换的服务，可以将视频转换为适合移动设备播放的格式。这可以减小视频文件的大小，从而解决缓冲问题。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Elastic Transcoder is a service dedicated to video format conversion, which can convert videos into a format suitable for mobile device playback. This can reduce the video file size, thus solving buffering issues.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用EC2实例进行内容交付和缓存需要较高的运维开销，不满足问题中“最小化运维开销”的要求。 CloudFront是一个更合适的解决方案。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using EC2 instances for content delivery and caching requires high operation and maintenance overhead, which does not meet the "minimize operation and maintenance overhead" requirement of the question. CloudFront is a more suitable solution.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然EC2实例可以用于视频格式转换，但这需要额外的管理和运维工作。 Amazon Elastic Transcoder 是专门的托管服务，运维开销较低，适合题型需求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although EC2 instances can be used for video format conversion, this requires additional management and operation and maintenance work. Amazon Elastic Transcoder is a specialized hosting service with lower operation and maintenance overhead and is suitable for the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 部署 Amazon CloudFront 以进行内容交付和缓存。；C. 使用 Amazon Elastic Transcoder 将视频文件转换为更合适的格式。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy Amazon CloudFront for content delivery and caching.; C. Use Amazon Elastic Transcoder to convert the video files to more appropriate formats.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (52%) C (46%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球分布式内容分发网络 (CDN)，可显著提高视频流性能并减少延迟。它支持缓存内容并优化内容交付，适合解决用户缓冲和播放问题。； Amazon Elastic Transcoder 是一项专门用于视频格式转换的服务，可以将视频转换为适合移动设备播放的格式。这可以减小视频文件的大小，从而解决缓冲问题。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (52%) C (46%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon CloudFront is a globally distributed content delivery network (CDN) that dramatically improves video streaming performance and reduces latency. It supports caching content and optimizes content delivery, suitable for solving user buffering and playback issues.; Amazon Elastic Transcoder is a service dedicated to video format conversion, which can convert videos into a format suitable for mobile device playback. This can reduce the video file size, thus solving buffering issues.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在启动部署在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 集群上的新应用程序，并使用 Fargate 启动类型来执行 ECS 任务。该公司正在监控 CPU 和内存使用情况，因为预计应用程序启动后会有大量流量。然而，该公司希望在利用率下降时降低成本。解决方案架构师应该推荐什么？
question_text.en: A company is launching a new application deployed on an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster and is using the Fargate launch type for ECS tasks. The company is monitoring CPU and memory usage because it is expecting high traffic to the application upon its launch. However, the company wants to reduce costs when utilization decreases. What should a solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 根据之前的流量模式在特定时间段进行扩展。
A.en: Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling to scale at certain periods based on previous traffic patterns.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数根据触发 Amazon CloudWatch 警报的指标违规来扩展 Amazon ECS。
B.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to scale Amazon ECS based on metric breaches that trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 和简单的扩展策略，在 ECS 指标违规触发 Amazon CloudWatch 警报时进行扩展。
C.en: Use Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling with simple scaling policies to scale when ECS metric breaches trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

D.zh: 将 AWS Application Auto Scaling 与目标跟踪策略结合使用，在 ECS 指标违规触发 Amazon CloudWatch 警报时进行扩展。
D.en: Use AWS Application Auto Scaling with target tracking policies to scale when ECS metric breaches trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EC2 Auto Scaling 主要用于管理 EC2 实例的扩展，问题中明确指出使用的是 Fargate 启动类型，并且 Fargate 不依赖于 EC2 实例。此外，基于“先前流量模式”的扩展无法实时响应当前流量需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 Auto Scaling is mainly used to manage the expansion of EC2 instances, and the question clearly states that the Fargate launch type is used, and Fargate does not rely on EC2 instances. In addition, scaling based on "previous traffic patterns" does not respond to current traffic demands in real time.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 Lambda 可用于触发扩展，但这不是推荐的方法。 AWS Application Auto Scaling内置了自动伸缩功能，直接使用效率更高。使用 Lambda 函数会增加复杂性并且不符合最佳实践。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While Lambdas can be used to trigger extensions, this is not a recommended approach. AWS Application Auto Scaling has built-in automatic scaling function, and it is more efficient to use it directly. Using Lambda functions adds complexity and is inconsistent with best practices.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：同样的问题， EC2 Auto Scaling 适用于 EC2 实例，并且该问题使用 Fargate 启动类型。简单的扩展策略不如目标跟踪策略灵活高效。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The same question, EC2 Auto Scaling applies to EC2 instances, and the question uses the Fargate launch type. The simple expansion strategy is not as flexible and efficient as the target tracking strategy.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Application Auto Scaling 支持 Fargate 任务的自动扩展。目标跟踪策略可以根据CloudWatch指标（例如CPU和内存使用率）动态调整任务数量，以满足问题的要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Application Auto Scaling supports automatic scaling of Fargate tasks. The target tracking strategy can dynamically adjust the number of tasks based on CloudWatch indicators (such as CPU and memory usage) to meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: D. 将 AWS Application Auto Scaling 与目标跟踪策略结合使用，在 ECS 指标违规触发 Amazon CloudWatch 警报时进行扩展。
answer_text.en: D. Use AWS Application Auto Scaling with target tracking policies to scale when ECS metric breaches trigger an Amazon CloudWatch alarm.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Application Auto Scaling 支持 Fargate 任务的自动扩展。目标跟踪策略可以根据CloudWatch指标（例如CPU和内存使用率）动态调整任务数量，以满足问题的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Application Auto Scaling supports automatic scaling of Fargate tasks. The target tracking strategy can dynamically adjust the number of tasks based on CloudWatch indicators (such as CPU and memory usage) to meet the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近在不同的 AWS 区域创建了一个灾难恢复站点。该公司需要定期在两个区域的 NFS 文件系统之间来回传输大量数据。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company recently created a disaster recovery site in a different AWS Region. The company needs to transfer large amounts of data back and forth between NFS file systems in the two Regions on a periodic basis. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 AWS DataSync。
A.en: Use AWS DataSync.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Snowball 设备。
B.en: Use AWS Snowball devices.

C.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上设置 SFTP 服务器。
C.en: Set up an SFTP server on Amazon EC2.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)。
D.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS).

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS DataSync 是一项专门为高效传输文件数据而设计的服务，支持跨区域传输，并且运营开销较低。 DataSync可以自动化数据传输过程，并且支持NFS文件系统，非常适合本题的场景。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to efficiently transfer file data, supports cross-region transfers, and has low operational overhead. DataSync can automate the data transfer process and supports the NFS file system, which is very suitable for the scenario of this question.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Snowball 设备通常用于一次性迁移大量数据，而不是定期数据传输。使用Snowball需要手动操作设备，运行开销较高，不符合“LEAST running Overhead”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Snowball devices are often used for one-time migration of large amounts of data rather than periodic data transfers. Using Snowball requires manual operation of the device, which has high operating overhead and does not meet the requirements of "LEAST operational overhead".

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：设置 SFTP 服务器需要手动配置和管理 EC2 实例，这会增加运营开销。虽然可以实现数据传输，但不如DataSync那么高效和自动化。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Setting up an SFTP server requires manual configuration and management of EC2 instances, which increases operational overhead. Although data transmission can be achieved, it is not as efficient and automated as DataSync.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS DMS 主要用于数据库迁移，而不是文件系统数据传输。本题需要传输NFS文件系统数据， DMS不适用。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DMS is primarily used for database migration, not file system data transfer. This question requires the transmission of NFS file system data, and DMS is not applicable.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS DataSync 是一项专门为高效传输文件数据而设计的服务，支持跨区域传输，并且运营开销较低。 DataSync可以自动化数据传输过程，并且支持NFS文件系统，非常适合本题的场景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to efficiently transfer file data, supports cross-region transfers, and has low operational overhead. DataSync can automate the data transfer process and supports the NFS file system, which is very suitable for the scenario of this question.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在为 AWS 云中托管的游戏应用程序设计共享存储解决方案。该公司需要能够使用 SMB 客户端访问数据。该解决方案必须得到全面管理。哪种 AWS 解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is designing a shared storage solution for a gaming application that is hosted in the AWS Cloud. The company needs the ability to use SMB clients to access data. The solution must be fully managed. Which AWS solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 创建一个 AWS DataSync 任务，将数据共享为可安装文件系统。将文件系统挂载到应用服务器上。
A.en: Create an AWS DataSync task that shares the data as a mountable file system. Mount the file system to the application server.

B.zh: 创建 Amazon EC2 Windows 实例。在实例上安装并配置 Windows 文件共享角色。将应用程序服务器连接到文件共享。
B.en: Create an Amazon EC2 Windows instance. Install and configure a Windows file share role on the instance. Connect the application server to the file share.

C.zh: 创建 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 文件系统。将文件系统附加到源服务器。将应用程序服务器连接到文件系统。
C.en: Create an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system. Attach the file system to the origin server. Connect the application server to the file system.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon S3 存储桶。向应用程序分配 IAM 角色以授予对 S3 存储桶的访问权限。将S3存储桶挂载到应用程序服务器。
D.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket. Assign an IAM role to the application to grant access to the S3 bucket. Mount the S3 bucket to the application server.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS DataSync 是一项数据迁移服务，而不是提供共享存储的解决方案。它不提供直接的SMB协议支持，不满足“完全托管”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DataSync is a service for data migration, not a solution for providing shared storage. It does not provide direct SMB protocol support and does not meet the requirements of "fully managed".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然可以通过 EC2 实例配置 Windows 文件共享以支持 SMB 协议，但这不是“完全托管”的解决方案。用户需要自行管理EC2实例的操作系统、文件共享配置和维护。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While it is possible to configure a Windows file share via an EC2 instance to support the SMB protocol, this is not a "fully managed" solution. Users need to manage the operating system, file share configuration and maintenance of EC2 instances by themselves.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是一项完全托管的文件存储服务，专门支持 SMB 协议。它满足问题所要求的“完全托管”和“SMB客户端访问”的要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a fully managed file storage service that exclusively supports the SMB protocol. It meets the requirements of "full hosting" and "SMB client access" required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 是一种对象存储服务，不支持 SMB 协议。虽然可以通过 IAM 角色授予访问权限，但无法将其作为文件系统直接安装到应用程序服务器。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is an object storage service and does not support the SMB protocol. While access can be granted through an IAM role, it cannot be mounted directly to the application server as a file system.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 文件系统。将文件系统附加到源服务器。将应用程序服务器连接到文件系统。
answer_text.en: C. Create an Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file system. Attach the file system to the origin server. Connect the application server to the file system.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 是一项完全托管的文件存储服务，专门支持 SMB 协议。它满足问题所要求的“完全托管”和“SMB客户端访问”的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server is a fully managed file storage service that exclusively supports the SMB protocol. It meets the requirements of "full hosting" and "SMB client access" required by the question.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望为在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的延迟敏感应用程序运行内存数据库。该应用程序每分钟处理超过100,000笔交易，并且需要高网络吞吐量。解决方案架构师需要提供经济高效的网络设计，最大限度地降低数据传输费用。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run an in-memory database for a latency-sensitive application that runs on Amazon EC2 instances. The application processes more than 100,000 transactions each minute and requires high network throughput. A solutions architect needs to provide a cost-effective network design that minimizes data transfer charges. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 启动同一 AWS 区域内同一可用区中的所有 EC2 实例。启动 EC2 实例时指定具有集群策略的置放组。
A.en: Launch all EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone within the same AWS Region. Specify a placement group with cluster strategy when launching EC2 instances.

B.zh: 启动同一 AWS 区域内不同可用区中的所有 EC2 实例。启动 EC2 实例时指定具有分区策略的置放组。
B.en: Launch all EC2 instances in different Availability Zones within the same AWS Region. Specify a placement group with partition strategy when launching EC2 instances.

C.zh: 部署 Auto Scaling 组以根据网络利用率目标在不同可用区中启动 EC2 实例。
C.en: Deploy an Auto Scaling group to launch EC2 instances in different Availability Zones based on a network utilization target.

D.zh: 使用逐步扩展策略部署 Auto Scaling 组，以在不同可用区中启动 EC2 实例。
D.en: Deploy an Auto Scaling group with a step scaling policy to launch EC2 instances in different Availability Zones.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Cluster Placement Group策略将实例放置在同一可用区的低延迟服务器中，优化网络性能，适合高吞吐量、低延迟的应用场景。正确：同一可用区内的数据传输免费，满足成本优化要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Cluster Placement Group strategy places instances in low-latency servers in the same availability zone, optimizing network performance and suitable for high-throughput and low-latency application scenarios. Correct: Data transfer within the same Availability Zone is free and meets cost optimization requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Partition Placement Group策略适用于分布式应用程序，主要用于隔离故障域，而不是优化性能。错误：跨可用区数据传输会产生费用，不符合成本优化要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Partition Placement Group strategy is suitable for distributed application programs and is mainly used to isolate fault domains and not optimize performance. Error: Data transfer across Availability Zones will incur charges and does not meet the requirements for cost optimization.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Auto Scaling Group主要用于动态扩展实例数量，而不是优化性能。错误：跨可用区数据传输会产生费用，不符合成本优化要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Auto Scaling Group is mainly used to dynamically expand the number of instances, not to optimize performance. Error: Data transfer across Availability Zones will incur charges and does not meet the requirements for cost optimization.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：阶梯伸缩策略主要用于根据负载动态调整实例数量，而不是优化性能。错误：跨可用区数据传输会产生费用，不符合成本优化要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Step Scaling Policy is mainly used to dynamically adjust the number of instances based on load, not to optimize performance. Error: Data transfer across Availability Zones will incur charges and does not meet the requirements for cost optimization.

answer_text.zh: A. 启动同一 AWS 区域内同一可用区中的所有 EC2 实例。启动 EC2 实例时指定具有集群策略的置放组。
answer_text.en: A. Launch all EC2 instances in the same Availability Zone within the same AWS Region. Specify a placement group with cluster strategy when launching EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Cluster Placement Group策略将实例放置在同一可用区的低延迟服务器中，优化网络性能，适合高吞吐量、低延迟的应用场景。正确：同一可用区内的数据传输免费，满足成本优化要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Cluster Placement Group strategy places instances in low-latency servers in the same availability zone, optimizing network performance and suitable for high-throughput and low-latency application scenarios. Correct: Data transfer within the same Availability Zone is free and meets cost optimization requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家主要在本地运行应用程序服务器的公司决定迁移到 AWS。该公司希望最大限度地减少扩展其本地互联网小型计算机系统接口 (iSCSI) 存储的需求。该公司只希望将最近访问的数据保留在本地。公司应该使用哪种 AWS 解决方案来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company that primarily runs its application servers on premises has decided to migrate to AWS. The company wants to minimize its need to scale its Internet Small Computer Systems Interface (iSCSI) storage on premises. The company wants only its recently accessed data to remain stored locally. Which AWS solution should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon S3 文件网关
A.en: Amazon S3 File Gateway

B.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 磁带网关
B.en: AWS Storage Gateway Tape Gateway

C.zh: AWS Storage Gateway 卷 网关存储卷
C.en: AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway stored volumes

D.zh: AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway 缓存卷
D.en: AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway cached volumes

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 文件网关主要用于将文件存储到 Amazon S3，同时提供本地缓存以加快访问速度。适用于文件级存储场景，而问题中提到了iSCSI存储（块级存储），所以该选项不满足要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 File Gateway is mainly used to store files to Amazon S3 while providing local caching to speed up access. It is suitable for file-level storage scenarios, and the question mentions iSCSI storage (block-level storage), so this option does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：磁带网关主要用于在AWS云中虚拟化存储本地备份磁带，适用于备份和归档场景。该问题没有提到备份或归档要求，因此该选项不满足要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Tape Gateway is mainly used to virtualize and store local backup tapes in the AWS cloud, and is suitable for backup and archiving scenarios. The question does not mention backup or archiving requirements, so this option does not meet the requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Stored Volumes模式将所有数据存储在本地并定期备份到AWS云。这种模式需要很大的本地存储容量，而问题要求“本地只存储最近访问的数据”，因此该选项不满足要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Stored Volumes mode will store all data locally and back it up to the AWS cloud regularly. This mode requires a large local storage capacity, and the question requires "only recently accessed data is stored locally", so this option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：缓存卷模式将所有数据存储在AWS云中，仅在本地缓存最近访问的数据。该模式可以在满足问题要求的同时，有效降低本地存储需求，因此该选项为正确答案。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Cached Volumes mode stores all data in the AWS cloud and only caches recently accessed data locally. This mode can effectively reduce local storage requirements while meeting the question requirements, so this option is the correct answer.

answer_text.zh: D. AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway 缓存卷
answer_text.en: D. AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway cached volumes

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：缓存卷模式将所有数据存储在AWS云中，仅在本地缓存最近访问的数据。该模式可以在满足问题要求的同时，有效降低本地存储需求，因此该选项为正确答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cached Volumes mode stores all data in the AWS cloud and only caches recently accessed data locally. This mode can effectively reduce local storage requirements while meeting the question requirements, so this option is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有多个使用合并账单的 AWS 账户。该公司为 Oracle 按需数据库实例运行多个活动高性能 Amazon RDS 90 天。该公司的财务团队可以访问合并计费账户和所有其他 AWS 账户中的 AWS Trusted Advisor。财务团队需要使用适当的 AWS 账户来访问 RDS 的 Trusted Advisor 检查建议。财务团队必须审查适当的 Trusted Advisor 检查以降低 RDS 成本。财务团队应采取哪些步骤组合来满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts that use consolidated billing. The company runs several active high performance Amazon RDS for Oracle On-Demand DB instances for 90 days. The company’s finance team has access to AWS Trusted Advisor in the consolidated billing account and all other AWS accounts. The finance team needs to use the appropriate AWS account to access the Trusted Advisor check recommendations for RDS. The finance team must review the appropriate Trusted Advisor check to reduce RDS costs. Which combination of steps should the finance team take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用运行 RDS 实例的账户中的 Trusted Advisor 建议。
A.en: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations from the account where the RDS instances are running.

B.zh: 使用整合计费账户中的 Trusted Advisor 建议同时查看所有 RDS 实例检查。
B.en: Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations from the consolidated billing account to see all RDS instance checks at the same time.

C.zh: 查看 Trusted Advisor 检查 Amazon RDS 预留实例优化。
C.en: Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon RDS Reserved Instance Optimization.

D.zh: 查看 Amazon RDS 空闲数据库实例的 Trusted Advisor 检查。
D.en: Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances.

E.zh: 查看 Trusted Advisor 检查 Amazon Redshift 预留节点优化。
E.en: Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon Redshift Reserved Node Optimization.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然Trusted Advisor推荐可以在运行RDS实例的账户中查看，但合并计费账户可以集中查看所有子账户的资源推荐，效率更高。因此这个选项不是最好的选择。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Trusted Advisor recommendations can be viewed in the account running the RDS instance, the consolidated billing account can centrally view resource recommendations for all sub-accounts, which is more efficient. Therefore this option is not the best choice.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：合并计费账户可以集中查看所有子账户的资源使用情况和优化建议，适合跨账户的成本优化场景。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The consolidated billing account can centrally view the resource usage and optimization suggestions of all sub-accounts, which is suitable for cross-account cost optimization scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然预留实例优化是成本优化检查项，但题目提到高性能按需型实例已运行90天，而Idle DB Instances检查更符合场景需求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Reserved Instance Optimization is a cost optimization check item, the title mentions that the high-performance On-Demand instance has been running for 90 days, and the Idle DB Instances check is more in line with the scenario requirements.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：空闲数据库实例检查可以帮助识别未充分利用的数据库实例，以便您可以优化成本。这是问题场景中必需的检查之一。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Idle DB Instances check can help identify underutilized database instances so you can optimize costs. This is one of the required checks in the question scenario.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该问题讨论的是 Amazon RDS 实例，而不是 Amazon Redshift，因此此选项与该问题无关。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The question discusses Amazon RDS instances, not Amazon Redshift, so this option is irrelevant to the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用整合计费账户中的 Trusted Advisor 建议同时查看所有 RDS 实例检查。；D. 查看 Amazon RDS 空闲数据库实例的 Trusted Advisor 检查。
answer_text.en: B. Use the Trusted Advisor recommendations from the consolidated billing account to see all RDS instance checks at the same time.; D. Review the Trusted Advisor check for Amazon RDS Idle DB Instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BC (44%) BD (44%) 12%。热门讨论与考点摘要：合并计费账户可以集中查看所有子账户的资源使用情况和优化建议，适合跨账户的成本优化场景。；空闲数据库实例检查可以帮助识别未充分利用的数据库实例，以便您可以优化成本。这是问题场景中必需的检查之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (44%) BD (44%) 12%. Popular discussion and key point summary: The consolidated billing account can centrally view the resource usage and optimization suggestions of all sub-accounts, which is suitable for cross-account cost optimization scenarios.; The Idle DB Instances check can help identify underutilized database instances so you can optimize costs. This is one of the required checks in the question scenario.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师需要优化存储成本。解决方案架构师必须识别不再被访问或很少访问的任何 Amazon S3 存储桶。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销实现这一目标？
question_text.en: A solutions architect needs to optimize storage costs. The solutions architect must identify any Amazon S3 buckets that are no longer being accessed or are rarely accessed. Which solution will accomplish this goal with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 S3 Storage Lens 仪表板分析存储桶访问模式以获取高级活动指标。
A.en: Analyze bucket access patterns by using the S3 Storage Lens dashboard for advanced activity metrics.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 管理控制台中的 S3 仪表板分析存储桶访问模式。
B.en: Analyze bucket access patterns by using the S3 dashboard in the AWS Management Console.

C.zh: 打开存储桶的 Amazon CloudWatch BucketSizeBytes 指标。通过使用 Amazon Athena 的指标数据来分析存储桶访问模式。
C.en: Turn on the Amazon CloudWatch BucketSizeBytes metric for buckets. Analyze bucket access patterns by using the metrics data with Amazon Athena.

D.zh: 打开 AWS CloudTrail 以进行 S3 对象监控。使用与 Amazon CloudWatch Logs 集成的 CloudTrail 日志分析存储桶访问模式。
D.en: Turn on AWS CloudTrail for S3 object monitoring. Analyze bucket access patterns by using CloudTrail logs that are integrated with Amazon CloudWatch Logs.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： S3 Storage Lens 提供高级活动指标，可以轻松分析存储桶的访问模式，同时将运营开销降至最低。它是一款专门用于监控和优化S3存储的工具，支持跨账户、跨区域分析。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 Storage Lens provides advanced activity metrics that make it easy to analyze a bucket's access patterns with minimal operational overhead. It is a tool specifically designed to monitor and optimize S3 storage, supporting cross-account and cross-region analysis.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3仪表板提供基本的存储信息，但不支持详细的访问模式分析。它不提供高级活动指标，因此不满足问题要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The S3 dashboard provides basic storage information but does not support detailed access pattern analysis. It does not provide high-level activity metrics and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： BucketSizeBytes仅提供存储大小信息，不提供访问模式数据。使用Amazon Athena分析数据增加了操作复杂性，不满足“最小操作开销”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: BucketSizeBytes only provides storage size information, not access pattern data. Using Amazon Athena to analyze data increases operational complexity and does not meet the requirement of "minimum operational overhead".

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudTrail主要用于记录API调用日志，而不是直接分析存储桶访问模式。使用 CloudTrail 和 CloudWatch Logs 进行分析需要额外的配置和操作，从而增加了运营开销。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudTrail is primarily used to record API call logs rather than directly analyzing bucket access patterns. Analysis using CloudTrail and CloudWatch Logs requires additional configuration and operations, increasing operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 S3 Storage Lens 仪表板分析存储桶访问模式以获取高级活动指标。
answer_text.en: A. Analyze bucket access patterns by using the S3 Storage Lens dashboard for advanced activity metrics.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (94%) 6%。热门讨论与考点摘要： S3 Storage Lens 提供高级活动指标，可以轻松分析存储桶的访问模式，同时将运营开销降至最低。它是一款专门用于监控和优化S3存储的工具，支持跨账户、跨区域分析。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (94%) 6%. Popular discussion and key point summary: S3 Storage Lens provides advanced activity metrics that make it easy to analyze a bucket's access patterns with minimal operational overhead. It is a tool specifically designed to monitor and optimize S3 storage, supporting cross-account and cross-region analysis.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司向从事人工智能和机器学习 (AI/ML) 研究的客户出售数据集。数据集是大型格式化文件，存储在 us-east-1 区域的 Amazon S3 存储桶中。该公司托管一个 Web 应用程序，客户可以使用该应用程序购买给定数据集的访问权限。 Web 应用程序部署在应用程序负载均衡器后面的多个 Amazon EC2 实例上。购买后，客户会收到一个 S3 签名的 URL，允许访问文件。客户遍布北美和欧洲。该公司希望降低与数据传输相关的成本，并希望维持或提高性能。解决方案架构师应该怎样做才能满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company sells datasets to customers who do research in artificial intelligence and machine learning (AI/ML). The datasets are large, formatted files that are stored in an Amazon S3 bucket in the us-east-1 Region. The company hosts a web application that the customers use to purchase access to a given dataset. The web application is deployed on multiple Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. After a purchase is made, customers receive an S3 signed URL that allows access to the files. The customers are distributed across North America and Europe. The company wants to reduce the cost that is associated with data transfers and wants to maintain or improve performance. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在现有 S3 存储桶上配置 S3 传输加速。将客户请求定向到 S3 Transfer Acceleration 端点。继续使用 S3 签名 URL 进行访问控制。
A.en: Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration on the existing S3 bucket. Direct customer requests to the S3 Transfer Acceleration endpoint. Continue to use S3 signed URLs for access control.

B.zh: 使用现有 S3 存储桶作为源部署 Amazon CloudFront 分配。将客户请求定向到 CloudFront URL。切换到 CloudFront 签名 URL 进行访问控制。
B.en: Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the existing S3 bucket as the origin. Direct customer requests to the CloudFront URL. Switch to CloudFront signed URLs for access control.

C.zh: 在 eu-central-1 区域中设置第二个 S3 存储桶，并在存储桶之间进行 S3 跨区域复制。将客户请求直接发送至最近的区域。继续使用 S3 签名 URL 进行访问控制。
C.en: Set up a second S3 bucket in the eu-central-1 Region with S3 Cross-Region Replication between the buckets. Direct customer requests to the closest Region. Continue to use S3 signed URLs for access control.

D.zh: 修改 Web 应用程序以将数据集流式传输给最终用户。配置 Web 应用程序以从现有 S3 存储桶读取数据。直接在应用程序中实施访问控制。
D.en: Modify the web application to enable streaming of the datasets to end users. Configure the web application to read the data from the existing S3 bucket. Implement access control directly in the application.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：配置S3传输加速分析： S3传输加速可以加速跨区域数据传输，但主要优化上传速度，而不是下载速度。问题：虽然您可以继续使用 S3 签名 URL，但传输加速不会显著降低北美和欧洲用户的数据传输成本或提高下载性能。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Configure S3 Transfer Acceleration Correctness: S3 Transfer Acceleration can accelerate cross-region data transfer, but it mainly optimizes upload speed, not download speed. Issue: While you can continue to use S3 signed URLs, Transfer Acceleration does not significantly reduce data transfer costs or improve download performance for North American and European users. Conclusion: This option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：部署 Amazon CloudFront 分析： CloudFront 是一个全球内容分发网络 (CDN)，可缓存 S3 中的数据并将数据分发到边缘站点，从而显著降低数据传输成本并提高性能。优点： CloudFront签名URL可以实现更安全的访问控制，同时优化北美和欧洲用户的访问速度。结论：该选项完全符合题目要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Deploying Amazon CloudFront Correctness: CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that caches and distributes data in S3 to edge locations, significantly reducing data transfer costs and improving performance. Advantages: Dapi CloudFront signed URL can achieve more secure access control while optimizing the access speed for North American and European users. Conclusion: This option fully meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：设置第二个 S3 存储桶并启用跨区域复制 分析：跨区域复制将数据复制到多个区域，优化性能。问题：这种方法会增加存储成本，并且需要额外的逻辑来管理用户请求的区域分配。这种方法比 CloudFront 更昂贵、更复杂。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Set up a second S3 bucket and enable cross-region replication Correctness: Cross-region replication copies data to multiple regions, optimizing performance. Problem: This approach increases storage costs and requires additional logic to manage user-requested zone allocations. This approach is more expensive and complex than CloudFront. Conclusion: This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：修改 Web 应用程序以启用流式传输 分析：流式传输可以降低一次性下载的带宽要求，但需要对应用程序进行重大修改。问题：此方法不会显著降低北美和欧洲用户的数据传输成本或优化性能。实现复杂度较高。结论：该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Modify a web application to enable streaming Correctness: Streaming can reduce the bandwidth requirements of a one-time download, but requires significant modifications to the application. Issue: This approach does not significantly reduce data transfer costs or optimize performance for North American and European users. The implementation complexity is high. Conclusion: This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用现有 S3 存储桶作为源部署 Amazon CloudFront 分配。将客户请求定向到 CloudFront URL。切换到 CloudFront 签名 URL 进行访问控制。
answer_text.en: B. Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution with the existing S3 bucket as the origin. Direct customer requests to the CloudFront URL. Switch to CloudFront signed URLs for access control.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：部署 Amazon CloudFront 分析： CloudFront 是一个全球内容分发网络 (CDN)，可缓存 S3 中的数据并将数据分发到边缘站点，从而显著降低数据传输成本并提高性能。优点： CloudFront签名URL可以实现更安全的访问控制，同时优化北美和欧洲用户的访问速度。结论：该选项完全符合题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Deploying Amazon CloudFront Correctness: CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that caches and distributes data in S3 to edge locations, significantly reducing data transfer costs and improving performance. Advantages: Dapi CloudFront signed URL can achieve more secure access control while optimizing the access speed for North American and European users. Conclusion: This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 设计一个用于处理保险报价的 Web 应用程序。用户将向应用程序请求报价。报价必须按报价类型分隔，必须在24小时内回复，并且不得丢失。该解决方案必须最大限度地提高运营效率并最大限度地减少维护。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is using AWS to design a web application that will process insurance quotes. Users will request quotes from the application. Quotes must be separated by quote type, must be responded to within 24 hours, and must not get lost. The solution must maximize operational efficiency and must minimize maintenance. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 根据报价类型创建多个 Amazon Kinesis 数据流。配置 Web 应用程序以将消息发送到正确的数据流。配置每个后端应用程序服务器组以使用 Kinesis Client Library (KCL) 来池化来自其自己的数据流的消息。
A.en: Create multiple Amazon Kinesis data streams based on the quote type. Configure the web application to send messages to the proper data stream. Configure each backend group of application servers to use the Kinesis Client Library (KCL) to pool messages from its own data stream.

B.zh: 为每个报价类型创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数和一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。将 Lambda 函数订阅到其关联的 SNS 主题。配置应用程序以将报价请求发布到适当的 SNS 主题。
B.en: Create an AWS Lambda function and an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic for each quote type. Subscribe the Lambda function to its associated SNS topic. Configure the application to publish requests for quotes to the appropriate SNS topic.

C.zh: 创建单个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列订阅到 SNS 主题。配置 SNS 消息过滤，以根据报价类型将消息发布到正确的 SQS 队列。配置每个后端应用程序服务器以使用其自己的 SQS 队列。
C.en: Create a single Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues to the SNS topic. Configure SNS message filtering to publish messages to the proper SQS queue based on the quote type. Configure each backend application server to use its own SQS queue.

D.zh: 根据报价类型创建多个 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 传输流，以将数据流传输到 Amazon OpenSearch Service 集群。配置应用程序以将消息发送到正确的传输流。配置每个后端应用程序服务器组以搜索来自 OpenSearch Service 的消息并进行相应的处理。
D.en: Create multiple Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery streams based on the quote type to deliver data streams to an Amazon OpenSearch Service cluster. Configure the application to send messages to the proper delivery stream. Configure each backend group of application servers to search for the messages from OpenSearch Service and process them accordingly.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： Amazon Kinesis适合实时数据流处理，但问题要求信息不能丢失，需要高效维护。 Kinesis需要额外的管理和开发工作（如KCL），不满足“最大化运行效率和最小化维护”的要求。结论：错误。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Amazon Kinesis is suitable for real-time data stream processing, but the question requires that the information cannot be lost and requires efficient maintenance. Kinesis requires additional management and development work (such as KCL) and does not meet the requirements of "maximizing operational efficiency and minimizing maintenance". Conclusion: Wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： SNS虽然可以发送信息，但并不能保证信息的持久性（信息可能会丢失）。 Lambda函数的触发也不适合处理需要持久化存储的信息列表场景。结论：错误。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Although SNS can send information, it does not guarantee the persistence of information (information may be lost). The triggering of Lambda functions is also not suitable for processing information list scenarios that require persistent storage. Conclusion: Wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：该选项结合了SNS和SQS的优点。 SNS负责信息分发， SQS负责信息持久和处理。通过 SNS 消息处理，可以根据报价类型将消息路由到正确的 SQS 队列。每个后端应用服务器都使用自己的SQS队列，保证信息不丢失，满足业务需求。结论：正确。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: This option combines the advantages of SNS and SQS. SNS is responsible for information distribution, and SQS is responsible for information persistence and processing. With SNS message processing, messages can be routed to the correct SQS queue based on the quote type. Each backend application server uses its own SQS queue to ensure that information is not lost and meets business needs. Conclusion: Correct.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： Kinesis Data Firehose 主要用于数据传输到存储或分析服务（例如 OpenSearch），而不是数据收集场景。该选项不满足问题所要求的信息持久性和高效维护。结论：错误。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Kinesis Data Firehose is mainly used for data transmission to storage or analysis services (such as OpenSearch), rather than data collection scenarios. This option does not meet the information persistence and efficient maintenance required by the question. Conclusion: Wrong.

answer_text.zh: C. 创建单个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。将 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列订阅到 SNS 主题。配置 SNS 消息过滤，以根据报价类型将消息发布到正确的 SQS 队列。配置每个后端应用程序服务器以使用其自己的 SQS 队列。
answer_text.en: C. Create a single Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. Subscribe Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues to the SNS topic. Configure SNS message filtering to publish messages to the proper SQS queue based on the quote type. Configure each backend application server to use its own SQS queue.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析：该选项结合了SNS和SQS的优点。 SNS负责信息分发， SQS负责信息持久和处理。通过 SNS 消息处理，可以根据报价类型将消息路由到正确的 SQS 队列。每个后端应用服务器都使用自己的SQS队列，保证信息不丢失，满足业务需求。结论：正确。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: This option combines the advantages of SNS and SQS. SNS is responsible for information distribution, and SQS is responsible for information persistence and processing. With SNS message processing, messages can be routed to the correct SQS queue based on the quote type. Each backend application server uses its own SQS queue to ensure that information is not lost and meets business needs. Conclusion: Correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个在多个 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的应用程序。每个 EC2 实例都附加有多个 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 数据卷。应用程序的 EC2 实例配置和数据需要每晚备份。该应用程序还需要在不同的 AWS 区域中可恢复。哪种解决方案能够以最高效的方式满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an application that runs on several Amazon EC2 instances. Each EC2 instance has multiple Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) data volumes attached to it. The application’s EC2 instance configuration and data need to be backed up nightly. The application also needs to be recoverable in a different AWS Region. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

A.zh: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数，安排应用程序 EBS 卷的夜间快照并将快照复制到不同的区域。
A.en: Write an AWS Lambda function that schedules nightly snapshots of the application’s EBS volumes and copies the snapshots to a different Region.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 创建备份计划以执行夜间备份。将备份复制到另一个区域。将应用程序的 EC2 实例添加为资源。
B.en: Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup to perform nightly backups. Copy the backups to another Region. Add the application’s EC2 instances as resources.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 创建备份计划以执行夜间备份。将备份复制到另一个区域。将应用程序的 EBS 卷添加为资源。
C.en: Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup to perform nightly backups. Copy the backups to another Region. Add the application’s EBS volumes as resources.

D.zh: 编写一个 AWS Lambda 函数，用于安排应用程序 EBS 卷的夜间快照并将快照复制到不同的可用区。
D.en: Write an AWS Lambda function that schedules nightly snapshots of the application's EBS volumes and copies the snapshots to a different Availability Zone.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：使用AWS Lambda函数可以实现自动备份，但需要手动编码来管理快照和跨区域复制，增加了开发和维护的复杂度。虽然可以满足需求，但运行效率较低，不是最优方案。结论：错误。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Automated backup can be achieved using AWS Lambda functions, but manual coding is required to manage snapshots and cross-region replication, which increases the complexity of development and maintenance. Although it can meet the needs, the operation efficiency is low and it is not the optimal solution. Conclusion: Wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析： AWS Backup 是一项托管服务，可以轻松创建备份计划并自动执行备份任务。将EC2实例作为资源添加到备份计划中，可以备份实例配置和数据，并支持跨区域复制。运行效率高，完全满足问题要求。结论：正确。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: AWS Backup is a managed service that makes it easy to create backup plans and automate backup tasks. Adding EC2 instances as resources to the backup plan can back up instance configuration and data, and supports cross-region replication. The operation efficiency is high and it fully meets the requirements of the question. Conclusion: Correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：虽然可以备份EBS卷，但问题需要备份整个EC2实例的配置和数据，而不仅仅是EBS卷。该选项不涵盖EC2实例的配置备份，因此不能完全满足要求。结论：错误。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Although EBS volumes can be backed up, the question requires backing up the configuration and data of the entire EC2 instance, not just the EBS volumes. This option does not cover the configuration backup of the EC2 instance and therefore does not fully meet the requirements. Conclusion: Wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：该选项仅将快照复制到另一个可用区，而不是另一个Region，无法满足问题所要求的跨Region恢复需求。使用Lambda函数会增加开发和维护的复杂性，导致运行效率降低。结论：错误。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: This option only copies the snapshot to another availability zone, not another region, and cannot meet the cross-region recovery requirements required by the question. Using Lambda functions increases the complexity of development and maintenance, and results in lower operating efficiency. Conclusion: Wrong.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS Backup 创建备份计划以执行夜间备份。将备份复制到另一个区域。将应用程序的 EC2 实例添加为资源。
answer_text.en: B. Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup to perform nightly backups. Copy the backups to another Region. Add the application’s EC2 instances as resources.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (94%) 6%。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析： AWS Backup 是一项托管服务，可以轻松创建备份计划并自动执行备份任务。将EC2实例作为资源添加到备份计划中，可以备份实例配置和数据，并支持跨区域复制。运行效率高，完全满足问题要求。结论：正确。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (94%) 6%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: AWS Backup is a managed service that makes it easy to create backup plans and automate backup tasks. Adding EC2 instances as resources to the backup plan can back up instance configuration and data, and supports cross-region replication. The operation efficiency is high and it fully meets the requirements of the question. Conclusion: Correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上构建移动应用程序。该公司希望将其覆盖范围扩大到数百万用户。公司需要建立一个平台，以便授权用户可以在移动设备上观看公司的内容。解决方案架构师应该建议什么来满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a mobile app on AWS. The company wants to expand its reach to millions of users. The company needs to build a platform so that authorized users can watch the company’s content on their mobile devices. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将内容发布到公共 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 密钥来流式传输内容。
A.en: Publish content to a public Amazon S3 bucket. Use AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys to stream content.

B.zh: 在移动应用程序和 AWS 环境之间设置 IPsec VPN 以流式传输内容。
B.en: Set up IPsec VPN between the mobile app and the AWS environment to stream content.

C.zh: 使用亚马逊CloudFront。提供签名 URL 以流式传输内容。
C.en: Use Amazon CloudFront. Provide signed URLs to stream content.

D.zh: 在移动应用程序和 AWS 环境之间设置 AWS 客户端 VPN 以流式传输内容。
D.en: Set up AWS Client VPN between the mobile app and the AWS environment to stream content.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：将内容发布到公共 S3 存储桶会公开内容，并且无法确保只有授权用户才能访问。虽然 AWS KMS 提供加密功能，但它不直接支持流服务，也不能解决内容分发的性能问题。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Publishing content to a public S3 bucket exposes the content and fails to ensure that only authorized users have access. While AWS KMS provides encryption capabilities, it does not directly support streaming services and does not address performance issues with content distribution.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： IPsec VPN 主要用于安全网络连接，而不是内容分发。不适合大规模用户接入场景，性能和成本也不适合流媒体业务。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IPsec VPN is primarily used for secure network connectivity, not content distribution. It is not suitable for large-scale user access scenarios, and its performance and cost are not suitable for streaming media services.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球内容交付网络 (CDN)，可高效交付内容并支持流媒体服务。签名 URL 通过确保只有授权用户才能访问内容来满足安全要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that efficiently delivers content and supports streaming services. Signed URLs satisfy security requirements by ensuring that only authorized users can access content.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Client VPN 主要用于远程用户安全访问 AWS 资源，而不是用于内容分发。不适合流媒体业务场景，无法解决性能问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Client VPN is primarily used for remote users to securely access AWS resources, not for content distribution. It is not suitable for streaming service scenarios and cannot solve performance problems.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用亚马逊CloudFront。提供签名 URL 以流式传输内容。
answer_text.en: C. Use Amazon CloudFront. Provide signed URLs to stream content.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon CloudFront 是一个全球内容交付网络 (CDN)，可高效交付内容并支持流媒体服务。签名 URL 通过确保只有授权用户才能访问内容来满足安全要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon CloudFront is a global content delivery network (CDN) that efficiently delivers content and supports streaming services. Signed URLs satisfy security requirements by ensuring that only authorized users can access content.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司拥有一个本地 MySQL 数据库，供全球销售团队使用，且访问模式不频繁。销售团队要求数据库的停机时间最少。数据库管理员希望将此数据库迁移到 AWS，而不选择特定实例类型，以应对未来更多用户的需求。解决方案架构师应该推荐哪种服务？
question_text.en: A company has an on-premises MySQL database used by the global sales team with infrequent access patterns. The sales team requires the database to have minimal downtime. A database administrator wants to migrate this database to AWS without selecting a particular instance type in anticipation of more users in the future. Which service should a solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: 亚马逊 Aurora MySQL
A.en: Amazon Aurora MySQL

B.zh: Amazon Aurora Serverless for MySQL
B.en: Amazon Aurora Serverless for MySQL

C.zh: 亚马逊红移频谱
C.en: Amazon Redshift Spectrum

D.zh: 适用于 MySQL 的 Amazon RDS
D.en: Amazon RDS for MySQL

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Aurora MySQL 是与 MySQL 兼容的高性能关系数据库服务。 Aurora MySQL虽然提供了高可用性和性能，但它需要选择特定的实例类型，这不满足问题中“不选择特定实例类型”的要求。因此，该选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Aurora MySQL is a high-performance relational database service compatible with MySQL. Although Aurora MySQL provides high availability and performance, it requires the selection of a specific instance type, which does not satisfy the requirement of "not selecting a specific instance type" in the question. Therefore, this option is incorrect.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon Aurora Serverless 是一种按需自动扩容的数据库服务，支持 MySQL，适合不频繁访问的场景。无需选择具体实例类型，可根据负载自动调整容量，满足问题中“迁移数据库、支持未来扩展、最小化停机时间”的要求。因此，该选项是正确的。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Aurora Serverless is an on-demand automatic expansion database service that supports MySQL and is suitable for infrequent access scenarios. It does not need to select a specific instance type and can automatically adjust the capacity according to the load, meeting the requirements of "migrating databases, supporting future expansion, and minimizing downtime" in the question. Therefore, this option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Redshift Spectrum 是一种用于分析数据的服务，适合处理大规模数据集。它不是关系数据库服务，不支持MySQL数据库迁移。因此，该选项是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Redshift Spectrum is a service for analyzing data and is suitable for processing large-scale data sets. It is not a relational database service and does not support MySQL database migration. Therefore, this option is incorrect.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon RDS for MySQL 是与 MySQL 兼容的托管关系数据库服务。虽然支持迁移，但需要选择特定实例规格，不满足问题中“不选择特定实例规格”的要求。因此，该选项是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS for MySQL is a managed relational database service compatible with MySQL. Although it supports migration, you need to select a specific instance type, which does not satisfy the requirement of "not selecting a specific instance type" in the question. Therefore, this option is incorrect.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon Aurora Serverless for MySQL
answer_text.en: B. Amazon Aurora Serverless for MySQL

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon Aurora Serverless 是一种按需自动扩容的数据库服务，支持 MySQL，适合不频繁访问的场景。无需选择具体实例类型，可根据负载自动调整容量，满足问题中“迁移数据库、支持未来扩展、最小化停机时间”的要求。因此，该选项是正确的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Aurora Serverless is an on-demand automatic expansion database service that supports MySQL and is suitable for infrequent access scenarios. It does not need to select a specific instance type and can automatically adjust the capacity according to the load, meeting the requirements of "migrating databases, supporting future expansion, and minimizing downtime" in the question. Therefore, this option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司遭遇了一次漏洞，影响了其本地数据中心的多个应用程序。攻击者利用了服务器上运行的自定义应用程序中的漏洞。该公司目前正在将其应用程序迁移到在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。该公司希望实施一种解决方案，主动扫描 EC2 实例上的漏洞并发送详细说明发现结果的报告。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company experienced a breach that affected several applications in its on-premises data center. The attacker took advantage of vulnerabilities in the custom applications that were running on the servers. The company is now migrating its applications to run on Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants to implement a solution that actively scans for vulnerabilities on the EC2 instances and sends a report that details the findings. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 部署 AWS Shield 以扫描 EC2 实例是否存在漏洞。创建 AWS Lambda 函数以将任何发现记录到 AWS CloudTrail。
A.en: Deploy AWS Shield to scan the EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. Create an AWS Lambda function to log any findings to AWS CloudTrail.

B.zh: 部署 Amazon Macie 和 AWS Lambda 函数以扫描 EC2 实例是否存在漏洞。将所有发现记录到 AWS CloudTrail。
B.en: Deploy Amazon Macie and AWS Lambda functions to scan the EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. Log any findings to AWS CloudTrail.

C.zh: 打开 Amazon GuardDuty。将 GuardDuty 代理部署到 EC2 实例。配置 AWS Lambda 函数以自动生成和分发详细说明调查结果的报告。
C.en: Turn on Amazon GuardDuty. Deploy the GuardDuty agents to the EC2 instances. Configure an AWS Lambda function to automate the generation and distribution of reports that detail the findings.

D.zh: 打开亚马逊检查器。将 Amazon Inspector 代理部署到 EC2 实例。配置 AWS Lambda 函数以自动生成和分发详细说明调查结果的报告。
D.en: Turn on Amazon Inspector. Deploy the Amazon Inspector agent to the EC2 instances. Configure an AWS Lambda function to automate the generation and distribution of reports that detail the findings.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Shield 主要用于保护应用程序免受 DDoS 攻击，而不是扫描 EC2 实例是否存在漏洞。它不具备主动扫描和报告漏洞的能力。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Shield is primarily used to protect applications from DDoS attacks, not to scan EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. It does not have the capability to proactively scan and report vulnerabilities.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Macie 主要用于识别和保护敏感数据（例如 PII），而不是扫描 EC2 实例是否存在漏洞。不适合漏洞扫描。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Macie is primarily used to identify and protect sensitive data (such as PII), not to scan EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. It is not suitable for vulnerability scanning.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon GuardDuty 是一种威胁检测服务，用于识别恶意活动和异常行为，但它并不专注于漏洞扫描。 GuardDuty 不需要将代理附加到 EC2 实例。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify malicious activity and anomalous behavior, but it does not focus on vulnerability scanning. GuardDuty does not require an agent to be attached to the EC2 instance.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon Inspector 是一项专门用于扫描 EC2 实例是否存在漏洞的服务。它主动检测安全问题并生成详细报告。 Amazon Inspector 需要在 EC2 实例上安装代理才能执行扫描任务。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Inspector is a service specifically designed to scan EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. It proactively detects security issues and generates detailed reports. Amazon Inspector requires an agent installed on the EC2 instance to perform scanning tasks.

answer_text.zh: D. 打开亚马逊检查器。将 Amazon Inspector 代理部署到 EC2 实例。配置 AWS Lambda 函数以自动生成和分发详细说明调查结果的报告。
answer_text.en: D. Turn on Amazon Inspector. Deploy the Amazon Inspector agent to the EC2 instances. Configure an AWS Lambda function to automate the generation and distribution of reports that detail the findings.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (98%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon Inspector 是一项专门用于扫描 EC2 实例是否存在漏洞的服务。它主动检测安全问题并生成详细报告。 Amazon Inspector 需要在 EC2 实例上安装代理才能执行扫描任务。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (98%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Inspector is a service specifically designed to scan EC2 instances for vulnerabilities. It proactively detects security issues and generates detailed reports. Amazon Inspector requires an agent installed on the EC2 instance to perform scanning tasks.
